name: WP-L12-label-prop-strings: hardcoded a11y/dialog/prop strings through t()
description: Route hardcoded English attribute/prop strings through i18n. Findings: F-063 (110 hardcoded accessibilityLabel screen-reader strings) · F-064 (25 platformAlert native dialog title+body pairs) · F-066 (60 label/title/placeholder/message prop literals outside auth). NOTE: JSX attribute literals are NOT covered by the existing ratchet — guard extension is a candidate follow-up capture, not in scope here. Full finding text: docs/audit/2026-05-29-full-audit/L-gap-delta.md (label l10n-a11y-mobile).
acceptanceCriteria: All cited sites routed through t() with en.json keys in same PR; i18n checkers green.
bodyText:
Bundle brief (WP-L12-label-prop-strings)
Transcribed from the PRG-12 execution tracker §1 (_wip/l10n-a11y/execution-tracker.md @ 9570f5b63) — bundle #4 of 8. Children are absorbed provenance (lifecycle rides this parent): WI-655 / WI-656.
Bundle rationale
The attribute-literal counterpart to WP-1: hardcoded English in accessibilityLabel props, native dialog copy, and label/title/placeholder props bypasses i18n invisibly (the jsx-literals ratchet deliberately excludes attributes).
Strategy
Three mechanical sweeps over distinct prop surfaces: (1) ~110 accessibilityLabel strings → t() (mind WI-622's landed common.loading pattern — reuse existing keys); (2) ~25 native dialog/platformAlert sites → t() for title/message/buttons; (3) ~60 label/title/placeholder props → t(). Keys namespaced per screen, same-PR en.json + pnpm translate. Candidate follow-up capture at review: extend the ratchet to attribute literals (per-prop allow/deny model — see AGENTS.md scope note and docs/audit/2026-05-29-full-audit/workflow-1/proposed-baseline.json).
Scope
In: F-063, F-064, F-066. Out: JSX text-children (WI-621, landing); building the attribute ratchet itself (capture as follow-up WI at review instead).
Findings
F-063 — 110 hardcoded English accessibilityLabel screen-reader strings.
F-064 — 25 native dialog (platformAlert) call sites with hardcoded English.
F-066 — 60 label/title/placeholder prop sites with hardcoded English.
Full finding text: docs/audit/2026-05-29-full-audit/L-gap-delta.md (label l10n-a11y-mobile).
Acceptance Criteria (bundle)
All in-scope attribute/prop/dialog literals routed through t(); en.json keys in the same PR; pnpm translate run.
Follow-up WI captured for the attribute-literal ratchet extension with the per-prop model pointer.
i18n checkers, typecheck, related tests green; no new hardcoded user-visible copy.
Risk & blast radius
Low/mechanical — prop-level string routing. Overlaps WI-623's component surface (run adjacent/serial with it). Sub-slice on demand if >PR-sized (~195 strings total — same screen-group split as WP-1 if needed, shepherd's call).
